rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.0257, which governs high school direct admissions data sharing. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: DIRECT ADMISSIONS DATA SHARING OPT-IN ELECTION FOR HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATION
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an entirely separate policy area from the proposed homestead exemption change.
